Kelpforge is a seed-stage company. Founded by Mateo Glimmerton. The seed conversation started in 2025.

---
title: Mateo Glimmerton

Mateo Glimmerton is the founder of Kelpforge. Mateo raised concerns about gross margin at the last board sync.

turns.text: Partner meeting wrapped on the Kelpforge round.
We decided to pass on the Kelpforge round. Pricing is too rich at this stage. Logging it now.
